name: Foreign Oil and Gas Tax Carryback and Carryover

eligibility.description: Corporations or individuals paying foreign oil and gas extraction taxes (FOGEI) or foreign oil related income taxes (FORI) exceeding current year limits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows foreign oil and gas taxes that exceed the Section 907(a) limitation to be carried back 1 year and forward 10 years.
